message.content:
@startuml
title Discovery

actor Client as c1
participant "↪ Alias" as alias1

c1 ->> alias1 : HEAD\n<http://level3.rest/profiles/alias>,\n<target-profile>\ntarget's Allow values\ntarget URL

note left of c1 #lightgreen:green:text:black
  Header      Value
  Profile     <http://level3.rest/profiles/alias>,
              <target-profile>
  Allow       target's Allow values
  Location    target URL
end note

client <- - client2: 307 Temporary Redirect / 308 Permanent Redirect


@enduml
